{{Infobox artifact
| name = Zenith Blade
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

''See also: [[Zenith Blade Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] Blade is a highly advanced relic from the era of ancient humanity, classified as a [[Zenith Device]]. It serves as a powerful tool for [[Aila Escalon]], providing her with combat capabilities that exceed the strength of opponents like [[Raion]]. The weapon possesses the ability to enhance [[Combat Arts]] and features an unpredictable adaptive system similar to [[The Last Horizon]]. This adaptation allows the blade to grant the user abilities tailored to their specific enemies; for instance, when facing seven opponents, it can create seven versions of the user. Beyond physical combat, the device is capable of hacking into processors and seizing remote control of spacecraft. The blade also exhibits a sentient, communicative nature, expressing emotions such as exasperation and sighing. In its [[Hallow Divide]] form, it appears as a shimmering, broad silver [[sword]] forged from one piece of metal. Its power is immense, capable of cutting through darkness, rainbows, and subspace itself.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] Blade is a highly dangerous, sentient artifact described as a broad silver [[sword]] with a straight blade that emits an orange light. Originally discovered by [[Solstice]], this weapon can remotely hack processors or take over ships and possesses an unpredictable ability to magnify [[Combat Arts]]. During the conflict, [[Aila Escalon]] utilized the blade to strike and as cover, tapping its hilt while fighting. Although the [[Pilot]] had long awaited a challenge against it, the blade was eventually seized by [[Nova-Bots]] and later broke into a ship. While [[Sola]] managed to hold her own against the weapon with help from her crew, the blade's current location remains unknown, though it was noted that [[Jak]]'s mother possesses it.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] can hack into processors or take over ships remotely.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is an artifact that was found by [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aila]] used the [[Zenith Blade]] to strike.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Pilot]] had been waiting to challenge the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] can magnify [[Combat Arts]] and has an unpredictable ability.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Zenith Blade]] is drifting in space.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] was seized by [[Nova-Bots]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The bearer of the [[Zenith Blade]] is not restricted by [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is an object whose location is unknown.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is a potential target of incoming fire.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is a broad silver [[sword]] with a straight blade.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is associated with [[Aila Escalon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] broke into the ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]] held her own against the [[Zenith Blade]] with support from her crewmates.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Jak]]'s mother possesses the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] emits orange light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is a highly dangerous entity or weapon.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is an artifact being used by an enemy in orbit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] was used by [[Aila]] as cover.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is a sentient or communicative artifact.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is a blade that [[Aila]] taps the hilt of.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] is held by a bearer who was fighting.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“What is the location of the Zenith Blade?” Omega asked, instead of asking about his daughter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
